MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dylan Schaffer of Kerley Schaffer LLP telephone nmuber (510) 379-5801 for Plaintiff.
Hyon Kientzy of Coddington, Hicks & Danforth telephone nmuber (650) 592-5400 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. DEFENDANT CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE'S Motion To Compel answers is granted. The Parties are to submit a proposed order on or before March 25, 2015. The order shall be stayed to permit Plaintiff sufficient time to file a writ to the Court of Appeals.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
